rooms.name: Executive Suites
rooms.desc: Spacious living area, king-sized bed, and premium amenities for the discerning traveler.

rooms.name: Deluxe Suites
rooms.desc: Peaceful views focused on comfort and elegance with modern amenities.

rooms.name: Highrise Suites
rooms.desc: Panoramic views of the surroundings with elevated luxury and elegant design.

rooms.name: Cottages
rooms.desc: Feature backyard balconies, high-speed Wi-Fi, television, and hot showers. Designed for extra privacy and groups.

facilities.title: Conference Halls
facilities.desc: Modern M.I.C.E facilities with high-speed internet. Amboseli, Nzambani, Syokimau, Highrise, Masai Mara, and Longonot halls.

facilities.title: Dining & Bars
facilities.desc: A culinary journey featuring the Main Restaurant, VIP Lounge, and Open Bar & Restaurant.

facilities.title: Swimming Pool & Gardens
facilities.desc: Relax in our central swimming pool or unwind in the lush gardens and kids zone.

testimonials.name: David Musyoka
testimonials.title: Business Traveler
testimonials.text: The Executive Suite was beyond my expectations. The blend of modern comfort with the serene Kitui atmosphere made my business trip feel like a vacation.

testimonials.name: Sarah Wanjiku
testimonials.title: Event Coordinator
testimonials.text: Best conference facilities in the region. The staff were professional, and the food was absolutely divine. Highly recommend for corporate events.

testimonials.name: James Omondi
testimonials.title: Holiday Maker
testimonials.text: An oasis of tranquility! The infinity pool and the VIP lounge are must-visits. Parkside Villa is truly the pride of Kitui.

items.name: Villa House Salad
items.desc: Fresh organic greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, and avocado with lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Creamy Garden Soup
items.desc: Seasonal vegetables blended with fresh cream and herbs, served with garlic bread.

items.name: Crispy Calamari
items.desc: Lightly battered calamari rings with spicy aioli and fresh lime.

items.name: Pan-Seared Tilapia
items.desc: Local tilapia fillet with coconut ginger sauce, steamed rice, and sautéed greens.

items.name: Grilled Beef Tenderloin
items.desc: Prime Kenyan beef served with mashed potatoes, seasonal vegetables, and red wine jus.

items.name: Vegetable Curry
items.desc: Aromatic garden vegetables in a rich coconut curry sauce, served with basmati rice and naan.

items.name: Warm Chocolate Brownie
items.desc: Rich dark chocolate with vanilla bean ice cream and chocolate drizzle.

items.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
items.desc: Selection of seasonal tropical fruits from the local market.

items.name: Cheesecake Excellence
items.desc: Baked cheesecake with berry compote and white chocolate shavings.
